requirement_topic.en: ZABS Import Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: ZABS电动汽车充电桩进口合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: ZABS電動汽車充電樁進口合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) is Zambia's national standardisation and conformity assessment body, operating under the Standards Act. ZABS administers an import conformity assessment programme (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity — PVoC) for regulated products imported into Zambia, which requires a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by an accredited certification body in the country of export before shipment. Electrical equipment, including EV chargers, falls within the scope of products subject to ZABS import conformity requirements. ZABS adopts IEC standards as Zambia Standards (ZS), so IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 are the applicable technical references. ERB (Energy Regulation Board) is the energy sector regulator under the Energy Regulation Act and licenses electricity supply, generation, transmission, distribution, and related activities — including commercial EV charging operations. A definitive EVSE-specific published mandatory CoC regulation under ZABS could not be confirmed to a single official source as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current PVoC scope, applicable ZS/IEC standards, HS code classification, and ERB licensing obligations with ZABS and ERB directly before shipment.
summary.zh: ZABS（赞比亚标准局）是赞比亚国家标准化和合格评定机构，依据《标准法》运作。ZABS对进口至赞比亚的受管制产品实施进口合格评定计划（出口前合格验证——PVoC），要求在出货前由出口国认可认证机构出具合格证书（CoC）。电气设备（包括电动汽车充电桩）属于ZABS进口合格要求的适用范围。ZABS将IEC标准采纳为赞比亚标准（ZS），因此IEC 61851和IEC 62196是适用的技术参考。ERB（能源监管委员会）是依据《能源监管法》设立的能源行业监管机构，负责颁发电力供应、发电、输电、配电及相关活动（包括商业电动汽车充电运营）的许可证。截至2026年6月14日，未能从单一官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的ZABS已发布强制CoC法规；出口商应在出货前直接向ZABS和ERB核实当前PVoC范围、适用ZS/IEC标准、HS编码分类及ERB许可义务。
summary.zht: ZABS（尚比亞標準局）是尚比亞國家標準化和合格評定機構，依據《標準法》運作。ZABS對進口至尚比亞的受管制產品實施進口合格評定計劃（出口前合格驗證——PVoC），要求在出貨前由出口國認可認證機構出具合格證書（CoC）。電氣設備（包括電動汽車充電樁）屬於ZABS進口合格要求的適用範圍。ZABS將IEC標準採納為尚比亞標準（ZS），因此IEC 61851和IEC 62196是適用的技術參考。ERB（能源監管委員會）是依據《能源監管法》設立的能源行業監管機構，負責頒發電力供應、發電、輸電、配電及相關活動（包括商業電動汽車充電運營）的許可證。截至2026年6月14日，未能從單一官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的ZABS已發布強制CoC法規；出口商應在出貨前直接向ZABS和ERB核實當前PVoC範圍、適用ZS/IEC標準、HS編碼分類及ERB許可義務。

standards_or_laws: ZABS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for regulated electrical imports (zabs.org.zm)
Zambia Standards (ZS) — adopting IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 series
ERB (Energy Regulation Board) licensing — Energy Regulation Act (erb.org.zm)

summary.en: China-market chargers are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where in scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence does not establish ZABS CoC status, satisfy the ZABS PVoC requirement, or substitute for ERB licensing or ZESCO connection approval in Zambia. A clause-level IEC mapping from GB/T test reports may provide a starting point for ZABS conformity documentation but is not a direct substitute.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据不能建立ZABS CoC状态、满足ZABS PVoC要求，也不能替代赞比亚的ERB许可或ZESCO接入批准。GB/T测试报告的逐条IEC对照可为ZABS合格评定文件提供起点参考，但不能直接替代。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據不能建立ZABS CoC狀態、滿足ZABS PVoC要求，也不能替代尚比亞的ERB許可或ZESCO接入批准。GB/T測試報告的逐條IEC對照可為ZABS合格評定文件提供起點參考，但不能直接替代。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) confirm the current ZABS PVoC scope and applicable ZS/IEC standard for the specific EV charger HS code with ZABS before shipment; (2) engage a ZABS-recognised accredited certification body in China to obtain the CoC under the PVoC programme; (3) prepare IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories; (4) confirm ERB licensing obligations for the intended commercial charging operation in Zambia; (5) obtain ZESCO connection approval for the specific installation site. Do not assume China CCC automatically satisfies the ZABS PVoC route.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 在出货前就具体电动汽车充电桩HS编码向ZABS确认当前ZABS PVoC范围及适用ZS/IEC标准；(2) 委托中国境内ZABS认可的认可认证机构，通过PVoC计划取得CoC；(3) 准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 61851、IEC 62196和IEC 61000测试证据；(4) 确认在赞比亚预期商业充电运营的ERB许可义务；(5) 取得具体安装地点的ZESCO并网批准。不应假设中国CCC自动满足ZABS PVoC路径。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 在出貨前就具體電動汽車充電樁HS編碼向ZABS確認當前ZABS PVoC範圍及適用ZS/IEC標準；(2) 委托中國境內ZABS認可的認可認證機構，通過PVoC計劃取得CoC；(3) 準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 61851、IEC 62196和IEC 61000測試證據；(4) 確認在尚比亞預期商業充電運營的ERB許可義務；(5) 取得具體安裝地點的ZESCO併網批准。不應假設中國CCC自動滿足ZABS PVoC路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — ZABS PVoC CoC applies to regulated electrical product imports in scope; exact EV charger mandatory CoC route and applicable ZS/IEC standard should be verified with ZABS for the specific HS code; ERB licensing and ZESCO connection approval are mandatory for operational deployments
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not a ZABS CoC or PVoC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Zambia market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the ZABS PVoC CoC route for the specific product HS code with ZABS directly, address IEC safety / EMC / connector evidence, and confirm ERB licensing and ZESCO connection approval as separate parallel requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足赞比亚市场准入。应直接向ZABS核实具体产品HS编码的ZABS PVoC CoC路径，处理IEC安全/EMC/接口证据，并将ERB许可和ZESCO并网批准作为独立的并行要求分别确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足尚比亞市場准入。應直接向ZABS核實具體產品HS編碼的ZABS PVoC CoC路徑，處理IEC安全/EMC/接口證據，並將ERB許可和ZESCO併網批准作為獨立的並行要求分別確認。

requirement_topic.en: Zambia EV Market Context — Nascent Market, Load-Shedding Constraints, and Opportunity
requirement_topic.zh: 赞比亚电动汽车市场背景——新兴市场、限电约束与机遇
requirement_topic.zht: 尚比亞電動汽車市場背景——新興市場、限電約束與機遇

summary.en: Zambia's EV market is very nascent as of 2026. EV penetration is low; the vehicle fleet is dominated by used internal-combustion-engine imports. Government interest in EV adoption exists within Zambia's broader energy transition and green economy goals, but no published national EV strategy with binding targets comparable to Qatar's EV Strategy 2021 was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. The most significant structural constraint for EV charging deployment in Zambia is grid reliability: Zambia depends heavily on hydropower (over 80% of electricity generation), and drought conditions — which have become more frequent — cause severe load-shedding of 8–12 hours or more per day. This directly limits the viability of grid-dependent DC fast charging without energy storage. Zambia's 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz IEC-standard grid and ZABS adoption of IEC standards mean that when EV infrastructure deployment scales, IEC 62196 connectors and IEC 61851 safety standards are the correct technical baseline. Early-mover deployments at logistics hubs, mining operations (a significant sector in Zambia), diplomatic compounds, and hotels are more viable than public urban fast-charging networks given current grid constraints.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，赞比亚电动汽车市场非常新兴。电动汽车普及率低；车辆保有量以二手内燃机进口车为主。赞比亚在更广泛的能源转型和绿色经济目标框架内对电动汽车推广表现出政府层面的兴趣，但截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认已发布的具有约束力目标的国家电动汽车战略（可与卡塔尔2021年电动汽车战略相比）。赞比亚电动汽车充电部署最重要的结构性约束是电网可靠性：赞比亚高度依赖水电（发电量占比超过80%），而旱情——近年来愈发频繁——导致每日8至12小时甚至更长的严重限电。这直接制约了无储能支撑的纯电网依赖型直流快充的可行性。赞比亚230 V / 400 V、50 Hz IEC标准电网及ZABS对IEC标准的采纳，意味着随着电动汽车基础设施部署规模扩大，IEC 62196接口和IEC 61851安全标准是正确的技术基线。鉴于当前电网约束，在物流枢纽、矿业运营（赞比亚重要行业）、外交区和酒店的先行部署，比公共城市快充网络更具可行性。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，尚比亞電動汽車市場非常新興。電動汽車普及率低；車輛保有量以二手內燃機進口車為主。尚比亞在更廣泛的能源轉型和綠色經濟目標框架內對電動汽車推廣表現出政府層面的興趣，但截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認已發布的具有約束力目標的國家電動汽車戰略（可與卡塔爾2021年電動汽車戰略相比）。尚比亞電動汽車充電部署最重要的結構性約束是電網可靠性：尚比亞高度依賴水電（發電量佔比超過80%），而旱情——近年來愈發頻繁——導致每日8至12小時甚至更長的嚴重限電。這直接制約了無儲能支撐的純電網依賴型直流快充的可行性。尚比亞230 V / 400 V、50 Hz IEC標準電網及ZABS對IEC標準的採納，意味著隨著電動汽車基礎設施部署規模擴大，IEC 62196接口和IEC 61851安全標準是正確的技術基線。鑑於當前電網約束，在物流樞紐、礦業運營（尚比亞重要行業）、外交區和酒店的先行部署，比公共城市快充網絡更具可行性。

standards_or_laws: Zambia National Energy Policy (Ministry of Energy, Zambia)
ZESCO load-shedding schedules and grid-reliability data (zesco.co.zm)
IEC 62196 and IEC 61851 — applicable technical baseline for Zambia EV infrastructure under ZABS IEC adoption

summary.en: China's domestic EV market is the world's largest, with extensive GB/T-standard infrastructure. However, China's domestic GB/T ecosystem — connectors, protocols, and communication stacks — is not interoperable with Zambia's IEC-aligned direction. Chinese manufacturers with IEC 62196 / IEC 61851 product lines (which many now offer for export markets) are better positioned for Zambia than those offering only GB/T-standard products. Grid-resilience features (wide input range, surge protection, battery buffer, solar-hybrid) are a genuine differentiator in the Zambia context and not merely a compliance checkbox.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车市场是全球最大，拥有完善的GB/T标准基础设施。然而，中国国内GB/T生态系统——接口、协议和通信栈——与赞比亚IEC对齐方向不兼容。拥有IEC 62196 / IEC 61851产品线（目前许多企业已为出口市场提供）的中国制造商，在赞比亚的定位优于仅提供GB/T标准产品的企业。电网韧性功能（宽输入范围、浪涌保护、储能缓冲、光伏混合）在赞比亚环境下是真正的差异化优势，而非单纯的合规选项。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車市場是全球最大，擁有完善的GB/T標準基礎設施。然而，中國國內GB/T生態系統——接口、協議和通訊棧——與尚比亞IEC對齊方向不兼容。擁有IEC 62196 / IEC 61851產品線（目前許多企業已為出口市場提供）的中國製造商，在尚比亞的定位優於僅提供GB/T標準產品的企業。電網韌性功能（寬輸入範圍、浪湧保護、儲能緩衝、光伏混合）在尚比亞環境下是真正的差異化優勢，而非單純的合規選項。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Zambia's nascent EV market and severe grid-reliability constraints mean that Chinese exporters must go beyond standard IEC compliance to succeed. Key actions: (1) design or select charger models with wide input-voltage tolerance (e.g. 180–264 V single-phase), surge/brownout protection, and optional battery buffer or solar-hybrid capability; (2) use IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connectors exclusively — GB/T connectors are immediately non-interoperable with the vehicle fleet; (3) target initial deployments at captive fleets (mining, logistics, hospitality) where grid-backup and controlled environments are feasible; (4) confirm ZABS PVoC CoC, ERB licensing, and ZESCO connection approval as regulatory pre-conditions; (5) monitor ZABS and ERB for evolving EV-specific regulations as the market develops.
gap.zh: 赞比亚新兴电动汽车市场和严峻的电网可靠性约束意味着，中国出口商必须超越标准IEC合规才能取得成功。主要行动：(1) 设计或选用宽输入电压容差（如180–264 V单相）、浪涌/欠压保护，以及可选储能缓冲或光伏混合能力的充电桩型号；(2) 专门使用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口——GB/T接口与现有车辆保有量立即不兼容；(3) 优先针对自有车队（矿业、物流、酒店业）进行初始部署，这些场所具备备用电源和可控环境的条件；(4) 将ZABS PVoC CoC、ERB许可和ZESCO并网批准确认为法规前提条件；(5) 随着市场发展，持续关注ZABS和ERB不断演进的电动汽车专项法规。
gap.zht: 尚比亞新興電動汽車市場和嚴峻的電網可靠性約束意味著，中國出口商必須超越標準IEC合規才能取得成功。主要行動：(1) 設計或選用寬輸入電壓容差（如180–264 V單相）、浪湧/欠壓保護，以及可選儲能緩衝或光伏混合能力的充電樁型號；(2) 專門使用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口——GB/T接口與現有車輛保有量立即不兼容；(3) 優先針對自有車隊（礦業、物流、酒店業）進行初始部署，這些場所具備備用電源和可控環境的條件；(4) 將ZABS PVoC CoC、ERB許可和ZESCO併網批准確認為法規前提條件；(5) 隨著市場發展，持續關注ZABS和ERB不斷演進的電動汽車專項法規。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity requirements under ZABS, ERB, and ZESCO remain in force independently; grid-resilience design is a practical necessity, not merely a compliance requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV market scale does not affect Zambia conformity obligations or grid-resilience requirements

source.publisher: ERB — Energy Regulation Board of Zambia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia's EV market is real but nascent and grid-constrained. Chinese exporters should treat load-shedding resilience as a core design requirement, not an optional feature, and focus on IEC 62196 connector interoperability and ZABS / ERB / ZESCO regulatory compliance as the non-negotiable entry conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚电动汽车市场真实存在，但处于新兴阶段且受电网约束。中国出口商应将抗限电能力作为核心设计要求而非可选功能，并将IEC 62196接口互操作性以及ZABS / ERB / ZESCO监管合规作为不可或缺的进入条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞電動汽車市場真實存在，但處於新興階段且受電網約束。中國出口商應將抗限電能力作為核心設計要求而非可選功能，並將IEC 62196接口互操作性以及ZABS / ERB / ZESCO監管合規作為不可或缺的進入條件。
